title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: IQM, Europe’s first public quantum company, admits the future of the tech is uncertain
summary: IQM, a full-stack quantum company out of Finland, went public on the Nasdaq today at a valuation of about $1.9 billion.

title: Jersey Mike’s IPO illustrates how bad the AI hype has become
summary: Just for kicks, I took a look at Jersey Mike's IPO documents. Surely a sandwich shop would have no need to mention AI. But low and behold.

title: IMF says tokenization could transform settlement and financial stability
summary: The global lender says blockchain-based finance could streamline markets but warns that fragmented standards and regulations may create new systemic risks.

title: Securitize Begins Trading on NYSE as Tokenized Shares Land on Solana, Avalanche
summary: BlackRock-backed tokenization firm Securitize now has shares trading on the New York Stock Exchange—or via Solana and Avalanche.

title: Anthropic is discussing a new custom chip with Samsung
summary: The news comes about a week after OpenAI announced its own custom AI chip in a partnership with Broadcom.

title: Ondo expands tokenized equities with onchain shareholder voting
summary: Ondo's latest partnership adds shareholder governance to tokenized stocks as competition in blockchain-based equity offerings accelerates.

title: OpenAI proposed donating 5% of its equity to a US sovereign wealth fund
summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has reportedly proposed giving 5% of the company’s equity to a U.S. sovereign wealth fund, reviving discussions about letting the public share in the financial gains from the AI boom.

title: Microsoft launches its own AI deployment company with $2.5 billion commitment
summary: Microsoft follows Amazon, OpenAI, and Anthropic with its new AI deployment group.

title: UK payments blueprint outlines tokenized payments for ‘multi-money ecosystem’
summary: UK regulators published an update to a national retail payments blueprint, calling for infrastructure support for tokenization and interoperability with new forms of digital money.

title: OpenAI weighs 5% stake for US government amid Trump talks: FT
summary: OpenAI has reportedly discussed giving the US government a 5% equity stake in early Trump administration talks as Washington tightens AI model oversight.

title: Robinhood links with dYdX Labs to launch new DEX Arcus
summary: The crypto protocol dYdX has rebranded as Arcus and is joining Robinhood’s new blockchain to bring perpetual and tokenized stock trading.

title: After $18B IPO, Bending Spoons founder says success comes from minimizing luck
summary: The co-founders of Bending Spoons, the Italian company quietly buying beloved, ailing Internet brands, learned big lessons from their own startup's failure.

title: Robinhood Launches 'AI-Native' Ethereum Layer-2 Network, Tokenized Stock Trading
summary: Brokerage and crypto exchange Robinhood opened the public mainnet for its Arbitrum-powered Ethereum layer-2 network on Wednesday.

title: Venice AI Valued at $1 Billion as Erik Voorhees Makes the Case for Private ChatGPT Rivals
summary: Venice reached a $1 billion valuation as founder Erik Voorhees argued AI companies should protect users' conversations.

title: Ahead of NYSE Listing, Securitize Exec Says DeFi Can Break Wall Street's Grip on Stock Lending
summary: Securitize President Brett Redfearn argues that tokenization will bring crypto's core benefit of disintermediation to retail investors.

title: Anthropic Bringing Claude Fable 5 Back Online as US Lifts Export Controls
summary: The Trump administration reversed its shutdown order after weeks of talks, with Anthropic tying Fable 5's return to a new safety classifier and other moves.

title: EchoStar’s satellite TV and wireless subsidiaries file for bankruptcy
summary:
EchoStar subsidiaries tied to its satellite TV and abandoned 5G network businesses have filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy protection, advancing a prepackaged restructuring plan to repay debt early after selling spectrum to SpaceX and AT&T.
